* PN View Moms survey is not a federal data collection. Race and ethnicity data were categorized in the following manner based on the way data were collected: Hispanic includes all persons who selected Hispanic ethnicity. Race categories are non-Hispanic. White includes White, Middle Eastern, and North African. Black includes Black or African American, Caribbean American, and African.
